text: Toluca’s signature sausage made with pork, herbs, and spices. Its vibrant color and intense flavor make it a must-try — grilled, crumbled, or served in tacos.
Thick corn bases topped with beans, meat, lettuce, cheese, and salsa. A street food staple that’s hearty, colorful, and full of local character.
Soft, creamy fudge made from pine nuts and milk, often shaped into decorative pieces. A traditional sweet that showcases Toluca’s artisanal candy-making legacy.
